pi_items.source: Verified by setup_task.sh which dynamically creates the application directory at this path.
Verified by setup_task.sh which configures the nginx service in docker-compose.yml to expose port 8080.
Verified by setup_task.sh which generates a docker-compose.yml file defining exactly these three services.
Verified by setup_task.sh which intentionally injects exactly 3 bugs into the docker-compose.yml file.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a fully synthetic three-service Docker compose stack (flask, nginx, db) located at /home/ga/app-debug. The nginx service is configured to bind to port 8080. The setup script intentionally injects exactly 3 bugs into the docker-compose.yml file: an incorrect MYSQL_HOST for flask, flask missing from the database network, and a missing top-level volumes declaration.
